# supermodel-api-docs Architecture Docs

## Entitys
- [ApiIntegration Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/domain-apiintegration.html): Defines the interface and protocol interaction layers through machine-readable specifications. Architectural overview of the ApiIntegration domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [DocumentationEngine Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/domain-documentationengine.html): Manages the framework-specific configuration and structural metadata for the documentation site. Architectural overview of the DocumentationEngine domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [WebStyling Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/domain-webstyling.html): Controls the visual presentation and frontend layer of the documentation interface. Architectural overview of the WebStyling domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [docs.json — supermodel-api-docs Source File](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/file-docs-json.html): Architecture documentation for docs.json, a json file in the supermodel-api-docs codebase.
- [overrides.css — supermodel-api-docs Source File](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/file-overrides-css.html): Architecture documentation for overrides.css, a css file in the supermodel-api-docs codebase.
